mapper.select: select id, plaza, publisher_user_id, category, title, status, tags, description, expected_time, expected_location, publisher_name, publisher_status, publisher_status_note, avatar_text, anonymous, verified, current_count, max_count, current_state, hope_you_can, preferred_way, gentle_replies from home_post where deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' and plaza = 'match' and id = #{id} limit 1

select id, plaza, publisher_user_id, category, title, status, tags, description, expected_time, expected_location, publisher_name, publisher_status, publisher_status_note, avatar_text, anonymous, verified, current_count, max_count, current_state, hope_you_can, preferred_way, gentle_replies from home_post where deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' and plaza = 'vent' and id = #{id} limit 1

select id, post_id, user_id, author_name, avatar_text, content, like_count, review_status, deleted, created_at, updated_at from home_post_reply where deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible' and post_id = #{postId} order by created_at asc, id asc limit 50
select verified, verify_status from user_profile where user_id = #{userId} limit 1

select id, user_id, notice_type, source_type, source_id, aggregate_count, read_status, created_at, updated_at from home_notification where user_id = #{userId} order by updated_at desc, id desc limit 20
mapper.update: update home_post set current_count = current_count + 1 where id = #{postId} and plaza = 'vent' and deleted = 0 and review_status = 'visible'
mapper.insert: insert into home_notification (user_id, notice_type, source_type, source_id, aggregate_count, read_status, created_at, updated_at) values (#{userId}, 'post_like', 'home_post', #{postId}, 1, 'unread', now(), now()) on duplicate key update aggregate_count = aggregate_count + 1, read_status = 'unread', updated_at = now()
mapper.update: update home_notification set read_status = 'read' where user_id = #{userId} and read_status = 'unread'
mapper.insert: insert into home_post_reply (post_id, user_id, author_name, avatar_text, content, like_count, review_status, deleted, created_at, updated_at) values (#{postId}, #{userId}, #{authorName}, #{avatarText}, #{content}, #{likeCount}, #{reviewStatus}, #{deleted}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt})
insert into home_post_report (post_id, reporter_user_id, reason, detail, contact, status, created_at) values (#{postId}, #{reporterUserId}, #{reason}, #{detail}, #{contact}, #{status}, #{createdAt})
